title: Sri Lanka stocks marginally up in mid-day trade
body_lines: ECONOMYNEXT – Sri Lanka stocks moved marginally up within the first hour of trade on Wednesday (22), Colombo Stock Exchange data showed.
The main All Share Price Index was up 0.13 percent or 9.46 points to 7,511.74 at 1145 hours.
The liquid index S&P SL20 gained 0.13 percent or 3.15 points to 2,403.72.
Top gainers were John Keells Holdings, Central Finance and Royal Ceramics Lanka. (Colombo/June22/2022)
